title: Basin Generation Fix
description: Basins are a rare, small terrain features that strip away the top layer of a biome's surface, leaving a stony floor. Due to a bug they stopped generating in 1.18. This mod/datapack adds them back
body:
**Basins are a small, rare terrain feature that strips away the top layer of a biome's surface, leaving a stony floor.**
**This makes the minecraft world feel more alive and gives it some age.**

**Due to a bug they stopped generating in 1.18. This mod/datapack adds them back to worldgeneration, fixing the issue**

![Basins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4f84275f671b3517ec1d1ecd5daacd5d41c620d_0.webp)
